chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 290 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 27.09.2023 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For hearing of CMA No.773/2015 (Stay/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.10.2023 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that purpose has been served and service of the petitioner has been regularized; therefore, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
